name: Ayame Moriya
description: Younger sister of Karen and the new team manager for the Eimei High badminton team.

name: Carmilla
description: Carmilla is a wraith who reigns over the undead, yet her true nature remains a mystery. She lives on the second floor of the clinic and enjoys all the chaos that befalls Zenos. (Source: Official Site)

name: Charlés
description: Charlés is an Exceed with the same type of magic as Happy. Wendy found her as an egg and they have been together ever since. They are very close, and Charlés sees it as her duty to protect Wendy from danger. Charlés is strict and uptight. She disapproves of fooling around. ~!Charlés, like all Exceeds, came from the parallel world Edolas. She is the Exceed's princess, daughter of Queen Shagotte. name: Cyan Hijirikawa
description: __Height:__ 154 cm __Position:__ Vocals and Guitar A cat girl who cherishes a heart-shaped guitar known as [Strawberry Heart](https://anilist.co/character/153391/Strawberry-Heart)—a legendary instrument rumored to possess extraordinary power. Her guitar talent was recognized by [Maple Arisugawa](https://anilist.co/character/153403/Maple-Arisugawa), leading to her recruitment as a member of Plasmagica. name: Fran Madaraki
description: Fran Madaraki is an artificial creation and one of the most advanced, made by the greatest surgeon in the world, Dr. Madaraki Naomitsu. She's not human, but instead a creature akin to Frankenstein's Monster, and her body is able to add or lose pieces, like up to six arms or cut the lower half of her body without pain or danger. Fran has a fraction of the Dr's ability, but it's still able to raise the dead (If they have been dead less than 24 hours), create genetically altered creatures, rebuild

name: Heracles
description: Heracles is a prominent deity in the Greek Pantheon. He is also one of the few divine beings, along with [Buddha](https://anilist.co/character/175945/Buddha) and the Valkyries, who are not in favor of ending Humanity. ~!Heracles is the Gods' representative in the fourth round of Ragnarok.!~

name: Huangquan
description: A drifter claiming to be a Galaxy Ranger. Her true name is unknown, and she walks the cosmos alone, carrying with her a long sword. Though aloof and taciturn, her blade flicks out like lashing lightning. And yet, she always strikes with her scabbard, never drawing the sword free.

name: Igneel
description: Fire Dragon and foster father of Natsu Dragneel Igneel has been shown to be a loving parental figure towards Natsu, though leaving him to fend for himself leads one to doubt this. Despite leaving him, Igneel is shown to be incredibly protective of Natsu as he watches him from afar. Contrary to his loving self, Igneel can also be very fierce when he wants to be. He has also shown some arrogance, referring to himself as "the one and only Igneel" during Grandeeney's visit. According to Grandeeney,

name: Lyza
description: Lyza the Annihilator is a legendary White Whistle who accomplished many great discoveries about the secrets of the Abyss. She is Ozen's apprentice and Riko's mother.

name: Mira Yurizaki
description: A very human-like android made by the wife of the developer of the coil technology. After Yurizaki Shidou, the man she called father, disappeared she starts to work with Mabuchi Kyouma to recover illegal coils.

name: Nu

name: Zenzou Hattori
description: __Height:__ 175 cm A highly skilled ninja who sports a light-brown/dark-blonde mop-top and a goatee. He is first introduced in episode 37 when he and Gintoki attempt to fight to the death over the last remaining issue of the Christmas Double Issue Jump, which in fact, was actually the Christmas Double Issue AKAMARU Jump. (in fact, he first appeared in episode 36 as the conman dreamcatcher's assistant). Apparently, he used to be from the Oniwabanshu too, and is acquainted with Ayame. He is the fi

name:
Akari
 Oozora
description: Akari is a clumsy, somewhat nervous girl. She highly admires Ichigo to the point of wanting to be an idol like her. She appears to cry and get frustrated easily, but is determined nonetheless. Akari is also quite resilient and is able to quickly recover from her mistakes. Her preferred brand is Dreamy Crown.

name: Arale Norimaki
description: Arale is a robot built by Senbei Norimaki that looks like a little girl. She is known for her naivety, energetic personality, lack of common sense, and amazingly unbelievable strength. Among her strength she can use abilities that range from the terrain splitting Chikyūwari ( Earth Chop) to the beam-like Nchahou ( N'cha Cannon). She is nearsighted and needs to wear glasses. Senbei Norimaki's mission is to convince the other citizens of Penguin Village that she is just a normal human girl. It see

name: Dera Mochimazzi
description: Dera Mochimazzi is a bird that speaks in Japanese, with a little bossy tone. It seems that he is a noble bird that came from a tropical place. He later stays at Tamako's house. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Fujimoto
description: He is a wizard, and Ponyo's father.

name: Kayena Hill
description: Kayena Hill is the first princess of the Eldyme Empire. She is the most beautiful woman in the Eldyme Empire, and is often praised for her beauty. Her beauty is such that it puts famous paintings to shame. ~!In her first life, Kayena was a foolish, wicked, and arrogant woman who couldn't even realize she was being used and manipulated. name: Kuniharu Saiki
description: Kuniharu Saiki is the father of Kusuo and Kusuke and the husband of Kurumi. (Source: Saiki Kusuo no Sai Nan Wikia)

name: Kyouko Izanami
description: Kyouko was once a mischievous, spirited, naughty little girl. However, her mother's death caused her to develop a meek, mild, and introverted personality. Ever since middle school, boys of her age consider her to be beautiful, including Youta.

name: Miho Azuki
description: __Height:__ 162cm Azuki is Mashiro's classmate. Her dream is to be a voice actor. She agreed to marry Mashiro when both of their dreams come true. However, she also told him that in the mean time, they should not have any distractions so they will contact each other only through emails. Her best friend is Kaya Miyoshi. Although her outer image is shy, she is a very mysterious girl. It is sometimes hard to know what she is thinking about.
